retry_reason: The function either succeeds or returns an error after cleanup. A retry would require new user-provided handles; the operation is deterministic for given inputs.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to wait on a set of syncobj fences (synchronization), not to manage reference counts. The dma_fence_put calls are incidental cleanup after waiting, not the central logic. No reference-counted object is passed to the caller.
